raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Santa Fe Drive Corridor Improvements Project was designed to address safety and circulation needs along a half-mile stretch of thoroughfare heavily used by students, faculty, and families.",
    "Removing the core safety features of the Santa Fe Drive Corridor Improvements Project would be unsafe, costly, and wasteful.",
    "The project included building barrier-protected bike lanes and walking paths, lowering the speed limit for vehicles, and providing a dedicated bus pullout area.",
    "The changes from the Santa Fe Drive Corridor Improvements Project have resulted in a slower corridor and a more orderly flow of traffic.",
    "The protected bike lanes, new crosswalk, and traffic calming measures are significant improvements for ensuring safety in the busy area.",
    "The safety improvements on Santa Fe Drive utilize proven, widely accepted, data-backed tools to save lives.",
    "Concerns about inconvenience or perceived safety risks regarding the improvements are not supported by data."
  ]
}
```
